name: Bachelor of Science in Electrical Engineering

program.title: Bachelor of Science in Electrical Engineering
program.description: This curricular program offers an excellent opportunity for the students to acquire solid academic preparations in electrical and electronic circuit theory and analysis. Graduates of the program are expected to be fully equipped and able to enhance the level of their competencies as they chart their professional careers in the development mainstreams, particularly in power, electronic and computer engineering including equipment/instrument design. This curricular program was conceived in response to the dire need for well-trained electrical and electronic engineers in all sectors of development, both the local and global scales. In the Philippines, graduates of electrical engineering are key players as the country modernizes in agriculture systems and accelerates in rural-urban and industrial base for the 21st century. Each student can specialize in one or more of the following fields: (a) power engineering, (b) electronic engineering and (c) computer engineering. Moreover, the student may choose thesis research or practicum as a specialization course.
